description: is a company that is revolutionizing the way of selling in the real estate market, facilitating the work of the sales team and back-office, providing a better service to customers. I am currently part of the development team of the 'Uncierre' project, which is the platform where real estate deals are closed.

is a startup that aims to generate decentralized financial markets infrastructure for traditional capital markets in order to make them more accessible to all. My work here focused on leading the implementation of an initial microservices architecture that can interact with the other services offered by the company, as well as helping with the creation of the financial core on which services are delivered.

is a software consultancy that offers itself as the technology arm of its partners to generate digital solutions. My work here focused on helping with a team of engineers to develop an MVP for a startup that aimed to reduce the carbon footprint of companies by measuring, quantifying and reporting on the decarbonisation pathways of different areas of a company.

is a Colombian company focused on the creation of robots, software and educational virtual classrooms ensuring that children learn to program and create technology while having fun. My internship in this company was based on applying my knowledge as an electronic engineer in an educational environment, teaching students and teachers about the importance of robotics and logical thinking.

is a software consultancy that offers technological solutions for micro-enterprises and companies. My work there was mainly in the development of a visual interface for a startup that was looking to manage growing artists through a virtual manager.
